items.headline: Three UN peacekeepers killed in southern Lebanon
items.body: Indonesian peacekeepers died after projectiles hit UN positions amid intensifying Israel-Hezbollah exchanges. France requested emergency Security Council meeting following the deaths.

items.headline: Israel enacts death penalty for Palestinians convicted of killing Israelis
items.body: Parliament approved legislation allowing capital punishment for Palestinians found guilty of such attacks. Rights groups condemned the law as violation of international legal protections.

items.headline: Federal judge freezes US childhood vaccine guidance changes
items.body: Court ordered halt to all immunization schedule alterations made since June 2025 pending review. Medical organizations questioned decision-making process behind changes to longstanding vaccination protocols.

meanwhile.text: UConn erased 15-point halftime deficit to beat Duke on buzzer-beater three-pointer
meanwhile.search: UConn Duke Elite Eight 2026 comeback buzzer beater

meanwhile.text: CERN physicists discovered doubly charmed baryon containing two charm quarks and one down quark
meanwhile.search: CERN LHCb doubly charmed baryon discovery 2026

meanwhile.text: Current flu vaccine reduced hospitalization risk by 30% for adults and 41% for children
meanwhile.search: flu vaccine effectiveness 2025-2026 hospitalization rates CDC

meanwhile.text: Gen Z church attendance in UK quadrupled over eight years, rising to 16% of young adults
meanwhile.search: Gen Z church attendance UK increase religious revival 2026

es.headline: Government closes airspace to US military flights linked to Iran operations
es.body: Spain closed its airspace to US planes involved in military operations against Iran. The defence minister confirmed neither bases nor airspace would be authorized for actions related to the conflict.

es.headline: Ground staff launch indefinite strike at major airports during Easter travel peak
es.body: Groundforce workers began an indefinite strike affecting 12 major airports including Madrid and Barcelona. Unions scheduled rolling stoppages every Monday, Wednesday and Friday in three daily time blocks until the dispute is resolved.

no.headline: Norway signs cross-border carbon storage deal with Belgium
no.body: Norway and Belgium signed an agreement to enable pipeline transport of CO2 from Belgium to Norwegian offshore storage sites. The infrastructure could become operational by 2031, managed by Fluxys onshore and Equinor offshore.

no.headline: Norway proposes additional defense spending to reach NATO target
no.body: Norway unveiled plans to spend an additional 115 billion kroner on defense over the next decade. The increase would bring defense spending to 3.5 percent of GDP by 2035, aligning with NATO commitments.

uk.headline: Car strikes seven pedestrians in Derby city center
uk.body: Counter-terrorism officers joined investigation into Saturday night incident. Police arrested suspect on attempted murder charges while maintaining motives remain unclear.

uk.headline: Financial regulator announces car finance compensation scheme
uk.body: Authority ordered lenders to pay affected customers following years of undisclosed dealer commissions. Scheme covers agreements from 2007 to 2024.

nl.headline: Inflation rises as energy costs surge following Middle East tensions
nl.body: Consumer prices increased to the highest rate in three months driven by energy price jumps. Statistics bureau attributed the rise to volatile energy markets amid ongoing regional conflicts.

nl.headline: Skeletal remains possibly belonging to musketeer discovered during church repairs in Maastricht
nl.body: Archaeologists found a skeleton beneath a church floor along with a musket bullet and French coin. DNA testing is underway to confirm whether the remains belong to a famous officer killed during the siege.
